provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: Reviewed the full realtime path: zalo bridge -> IncomingMessage DTO -> command emit. Live round trip proved a real message is surfaced.

findings.evidence: IncomingMessage carries only display fields (thread/sender/text/msg_id/timestamp) — no credential or session state. The zalo bridge maps zca-rust's Message into this DTO so the UI never sees zca-rust types.
findings.fix: Keep secrets out of the event DTO as richer message types are added in Phase 4.

summary: listener-events is proven live: a real message round-tripped through the zca-rust websocket and was surfaced as a core IncomingMessage, then emitted as a zalo://message Tauri event. zca-rust types stay confined to the zalo layer; the event DTO carries no secrets. Build, clippy -D warnings, 7 offline tests, and the live smoke all pass. Safe to mark done.
